headline: Why Is Booking Holdings (BKNG) Up 7.2% Since Last Earnings Report?
summary: Booking Holdings (BKNG) reported earnings 30 days ago. What's next for the stock? We take a look at earnings estimates for some clues.

headline: Travel insurance is gaining popularity among spring breakers this year — here's how to protect your trip
summary: Amid conflicts abroad and airport delays, American travelers are increasingly looking for coverage.

headline: What Booking Holdings (BKNG)'s India Corporate Travel Tie-Up Signals About Its Enterprise Strategy
summary: In recent days, Thomas Cook (India) and SOTC Travel announced a partnership with Booking.com to power India-focused corporate accommodation, integrating over 31 million listings across more than 220 countries into their booking tools with India-specific controls and GST-compliant invoicing. This collaboration highlights Booking Holdings’ push into higher-value corporate travel, combining broad global inventory with enterprise-grade policy control, reporting, and support for Indian business...

headline: Agoda's Top Picks for Unique Zipline Adventures in Asia
summary: Digital travel platform Agoda's latest recommendations highlight destinations where travelers can enjoy unique zipline adventures across Asia. Experiences are at the heart of travel, and ziplining offers thrill-seekers an exciting way to experience Asia's diverse landscapes and natural beauty, from the lush jungles of Chiang Mai to the breathtaking waterfall views of Da Lat.
